name: working-with-legacy-code
description: Safely change and test untested codebases using Michael C. Feathers'' "Working Effectively with Legacy Code". Use when the user mentions "legacy code", "no tests", "untested codebase", "how do I test this", "seams", "characterization tests", "sprout method", "afraid to change this code", "monster method", or "dependency breaking". Also trigger when modifying code without tests safely, getting a class under test when constructors, statics, or singletons block it, adding features to tangled module
author: wondelai
